productDisplayName: Little Miss Girls Blazing Yellow Clothing Set
description: Style NoteLight and summery to suit the season, this top and skirt set from little miss will make your little girl look sweet and keep her sweat-free. The soft fabric is as comfy as it is prettyProduct DetailsYellow top that has a round neck with a frill on the front and back, yellow and white ruffled sleeves, and graphic print on the frontYellow printed skirt with a broad waistband, pink piping with a pink bow below the waistband, buttoned closure on the left and pleated from the piping downMaterial and Care100% CottonMachine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
